title: runtime/v1 Task.metadata additions
description: Schema for the runtime.* keys that the runtime/v1 extension adds to A2A Task.metadata. This schema validates only the runtime.* subset of Task.metadata; the parent metadata object remains open per A2A core (additionalProperties is not constrained here so other extensions may coexist).

runtime.instance_id.description: UUID v4 of the runtime instance that produced this Task. MUST equal the instance_id from the AgentCard params of the producing agent.

runtime.kind.description: Runtime kind. MUST equal the AgentCard params.runtime of the producing agent.

runtime.host.description: Opaque identifier of the host machine backing the instance (libvirt host, k8s node, etc.). Optional; disclosure gated by operator policy. When omitted, the field MUST simply be absent — implementations MUST NOT emit a placeholder value.
